name: Patient Case
history: Complex relationship history involving a person named Cricket that affected the patient's social circle. The patient often takes a caretaking role with friends, including a friend named Lucy with ongoing medical issues.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I need to take care of others to be valued.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I don't help others, I will be abandoned.
coping_strategies: The patient takes on a caretaking role to maintain relationships.
situation: Friends are gathered outside the residence waiting while the patient is running late after work.
auto_thought: They will be upset with me for being late.
behavior: Hurrying to meet friends despite being tired from work.
